title: TDD Rust workspace, protocol crate, fixtures, and schema export

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Create the Rust workspace foundation and protocol crate for autocomplete requests/responses.
goals: Use the tdd skill: implement in vertical red-green-refactor slices.
Create a Cargo workspace with Rust crates under crates/ and example fixtures under examples/fixtures.
Implement protocol request/response/error/client/document/cursor/context/options types with serde support.
Implement protocol versioning, validation, JSON Schema export, and fixture validation tests.
Add a Protocol README describing transport, endpoints, request/response fields, versioning, and error codes.
non_goals: Do not implement the HTTP server yet.
Do not implement pi provider yet.
Do not create VS Code or Obsidian host glue in this task.
safety: Do not edit files tagged human-written.
Use Cargo for Rust dependencies; do not install system packages.
success_criteria: cargo test passes for the protocol crate/workspace slice.
Fixture examples based on the MVP plan validate successfully.
JSON Schema can be generated from Rust types.
Write a handoff to reports/orchestration/mvp-2026-05-28/handoffs/MVP-010-protocol-core-tdd.json with tests run, files changed, and remaining risks.
